texto: A person raised in a healthy family is equipped to live a confident and independent life
autor: someone from an unhealthy family is filled with fear and self-doubt. He has difficulty with the prospect of life without someone else. The devaluing messages of control and manipulation create dependency so those who most need to leave their family of origin are the least equipped to do so.
explicacao: Citação de someone from an unhealthy family is filled with fear and self-doubt. He has difficulty with the prospect of life without someone else. The devaluing messages of control and manipulation create dependency so those who most need to leave their family of origin are the least equipped to do so. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “A person raised in a healthy family is equipped to live a confident and independent life” articula reflexao, christina-enevoldsen, person em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.
